headline: These Insiders Are Quietly Loading Up on Charter After the Post-Earnings Plunge
summary: The smart money inside the Charter Communications (NASDAQ: CHTR) boardroom turned aggressively bullish in the days after the company’s post-earnings collapse. The American telecommunications and mass media company saw its sitting chief executive and two independent directors file Form 4 open-market purchases on the same day, an unambiguous Code P buy cluster, contrasting sharply with ... These Insiders Are Quietly Loading Up on Charter After the Post-Earnings Plunge
